page.title: My subscriptions
page.error: We couldn't load your subscriptions right now. Please refresh the page.

empty.title: No subscriptions yet
empty.body: When you subscribe to a product, you'll manage it here — pause, skip a delivery, or change the date.

notice.pause_ok: Your subscription is paused. Resume it any time.
notice.resume_ok: Welcome back — your subscription is active again.
notice.skip_ok: Done — your next delivery is skipped.
notice.reschedule_ok: Your next charge date is updated.
notice.failed: That didn't work. Please try again.
notice.failed_not_yours: We couldn't find that subscription on your account.
notice.failed_shopify_rejected: Shopify couldn't apply that change. Please try again.
